CHMTHRPY_INTRVNS_DSCHRG_CD Treatment: Chemo - IV (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was receiving IV chemotherapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
567 CHMTHRPY_ORAL_ADMSN_CD CHMTHRPY_ORAL_ADMSN_CD Treatment: Chemo - Oral (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving oral chemotherapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
568 CHMTHRPY_ORAL_DSCHRG_CD
